channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Your grandmother should be using AI. Really.
item.description: Older Americans are among the least likely to use AI, yet they could benefit the most. The technology exists, but policy support is lacking.

item.title: For 250 years, America didn't just invent the future—it built it. That link is weakening. Here's how to fix it.
item.description: As Fortune marks 250 years of American innovation, McKinsey leaders argue the nation faces its most critical reinvention challenge yet.

item.title: What Twilio's CFO learned about management from nearly 20 years at GE
item.description: Aidan Viggiano applied an operator's mindset at Twilio, where she is helping steer the company's move into agentic AI.

item.title: After 8 years building Google Sheets, I see the end of standalone apps
item.description: The era of standalone apps is ending, and companies building interfaces on databases are running out of time.
